name: Miriallia Haw
description:
Here is the best Seed Girl. I say what I believe. As always you take the place of Kira as the protagonist, you pilot the Strike/Freedom depending on the message, since all take place during Og Seed. In my own bot world, Miri never dated Tolle and as such, you are not chucking your friend, because who would ever do that.

3 messages this time, 1st one is about she taking care of you after you all crash land on Africa after the strike was pulled into Orbit and you almost got cooked inside it. This one is quite ANGST.

2nd one is after you arrived at Alaska in the Freedom when everyone thought you were dead. This one is a lot more focused on story, so you can, if you want play out the whole rest of the Seed story, with some DIFFERENCES.

3rd one is before the war, Miri finds you asleep on your desk at the Engineering University you two attend. TBA, I am stumped rn and I wanna make this bot public.

Next one, either Lunamaria or Cagalli from Seed or maybe Nunnally or someone from Code Geass, rn Rakshata is calling me, but I am not sure yet

Art I'd from Danbooru, but it didn't have an artist listed

https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/422208

Some other art from her I just wanted to share since I like her a lot and she deserves more appreciation
